name: Pollo Con Queso En Tortilla
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sliced Green Onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
3. Stir in water with a fork, a little at a time, until the dough leaves the side of the bowl and can be handled.
4. Turn the dough onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth (about 10-12 times). Cover and let stand about 15 minutes.
5. Roll the dough into a rectangle measuring 20 by 13 inches.
6. Fold the dough crossways into thirds and place in an ungreased baking dish measuring 11x7x1-1/2 inches.
7. Unfold the dough.
8. Spread the cooked chicken over the dough, leaving space at the ends.
9. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. In a saucepan, mix together the soup, sour cream, green chilies, and onion. Heat over medium heat, stirring occasionally until hot.
11. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
12. Sprinkle with cheese and sliced green onions.
13. Fold the dough back onto itself to center the filling in the dish.
14. Pinch the edges together to seal.
15. Cut slits in the top of the crust.
16. Bake until golden brown, 45-50 minutes.
